wins: Q4 revenue exceeded expectations and was at the higher end of guidance
Strong EPS upside due to operating leverage and expense management
Intel 3 achieved manufacturing readiness in Q4 as committed
Intel 20A and 18A processes are first in the industry with advanced features
Intel Foundry Services (IFS) has over $10 billion in lifetime deal value
risks: Lower Q1 revenue guidance due to discrete headwinds like Mobileye, PSG, and business exits
Significant drop in IFS revenue due to cyclical weakness in wafer equipment buying
Depreciation and variable factory start-up costs expected to grow in 2024
Potential challenges in achieving 60% gross margin due to 5 nodes in 4 years
Market share risks in the data center segment due to FPGA inventory correction
